_schema: Each event: { date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', time: 'HH:MM', tz: 'America/New_York', impact: 'high'|'medium', name: 'string' }. Strategies skip ±30min around 'high' impact items.
_upgrade_path: V2 could fetch from forexfactory.com or tradingeconomics.com. For now maintain this file manually with the week's high-impact USD/Gold events: NFP, CPI, PPI, FOMC, Retail Sales, Fed speakers.

events.name: Example: US Retail Sales (remove or update this stub)
